name: How long does it take to see results from Google Assistant optimization?
description: Small improvements can show up in days, but meaningful voice-search gains usually take weeks or months depending on your site, local data, and competition.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to see results from Google Assistant optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: Some improvements can be visible within days if your business profile or page structure was already close to ready, but stronger results usually take weeks or months. Faster pages, better local data, and clearer answers tend to show the earliest gains.
acceptedAnswer.description: Small improvements can show up in days, but meaningful voice-search gains usually take weeks or months depending on your site, local data, and competition.
